name: ops-skills
description: Combined debugging + automation skills for Claude Code, one per technology: python-ops, js-ts-ops, docker-ops, k8s-ops, cloud-ops (AWS+GCP), redis-saas-ops, cloudfront-ops, dynatrace-ops, model-router. Each *-ops skill is a symptom-to-fix decision tree plus copy-pasteable automation; model-router routes tasks to the right-sized Claude model by cost/complexity.
